terms.summary: S1 deals 1170% ATK physical damage and grants four-action damage dealt up to self and the two slowest other allies.
S2 projects its four-target 530% ATK physical attack onto the single raid dummy.
Self and adjacent ally defense buffs do not affect outgoing damage against a non-attacking dummy.
Debuff cleansing and incoming damage reduction are outside the current dummy model.

effectGroups.summary: Removable damage dealt buff; one configured 0-4 incoming-hit tier is shared by all recipients.
Adjacent ally DEF and physical DEF increase.
Self DEF and physical DEF increase.

ignored.summary: Ally-side defense buffs have no outgoing-damage effect on the dummy.
Incoming damage reduction is not simulated.
Per-recipient incoming-hit history is replaced by one shared configured tier.
